abilities.name: Shining Horn
abilities.text: As long as Heracross is your Active Pokemon and you have no Benched Pokemon, prevent all damage done to Heracross by attacks from your opponent's Basic Pokemon.

attacks.name: Extra Claws
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokemon is Pokemon-ex, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage.

tests.name: shining_horn_blocks_basic
tests.description: Test that Shining Horn prevents damage from Basic Pokemon

tests.name: extra_claws_bonus_vs_ex
tests.description: Test that Extra Claws deals +20 against Pokemon-ex
